title: Agentic Support Copilot
summary: Route issues, summarize conversations, and generate response suggestions for human support teams.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Agentic Support Copilot is positioned as a Customer Support AI starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Route issues, summarize conversations, and generate response suggestions for human support teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on agent, support, automation.
